name: Graviton
description: A sleek, white-and-gold explorer vessel designed for deep-space reconnaissance and diplomatic missions.

bays.name: Bridge
bays.description: The nerve center of the Graviton. Holographic displays project real-time stellar cartography while the captain's chair interfaces directly with the ship's AI.

bays.name: Communications Array
bays.description: A quantum-entangled transmitter array capable of faster-than-light messaging across sectors. Houses the encrypted diplomatic channels.

bays.name: Observation Lounge
bays.description: A panoramic dome atop the command deck offering an unobstructed view of the cosmos. Often used for diplomatic receptions and crew morale events.

bays.name: Crew Quarters
bays.description: Modular living pods for up to 120 crew members. Each pod features adaptive gravity plating and personal environmental controls.

bays.name: Medical Bay
bays.description: State-of-the-art medical facility with regeneration chambers, nano-surgical suites, and a quarantine wing for xenobiological encounters.

bays.name: Armory
bays.description: Secured weapons storage and tactical preparation area. Contains personal sidearms, energy shields, and EVA combat suits.

bays.name: Graviton Reactor Core
bays.description: The ship's namesake — a miniature graviton singularity harnessed for near-infinite energy. Shielded by triple-layered containment fields.

bays.name: FTL Drive Chamber
bays.description: The Alcubierre-type warp drive that bends spacetime for faster-than-light travel. Requires a 90-second spin-up before jump.

bays.name: Life Support Systems
bays.description: Atmospheric processors, water recyclers, and gravity generators. Redundant systems ensure 72 hours of emergency operation.

bays.name: Main Cargo Bay
bays.description: A cavernous storage area with magnetic clamps and zero-g loading zones. Can hold up to 500 metric tons of supplies or salvage.

bays.name: Shuttle Bay
bays.description: Houses two Sparrow-class shuttlecraft for planetary landings and short-range reconnaissance. Includes repair gantries and fuel reserves.

bays.name: Xenoscience Laboratory
bays.description: A sealed research facility for analyzing alien artifacts, biological samples, and anomalous materials collected during missions.
